ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anduin2017/HowToCook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anduin2017/HowToCook
Language: unknown
程序员在家做饭方法指南。Programmer's guide about how to cook at home (Simplified Chinese only).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CVEProject/cvelistV5
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CVEProject/cvelistV5
Language: unknown
CVE cache of the official CVE List in CVE JSON 5 format

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Johnshall/Shadowrocket-ADBlock-Rules-Forever
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Johnshall/Shadowrocket-ADBlock-Rules-Forever
Language: unknown
提供多款 Shadowrocket 规则，拥有强劲的广告过滤功能。每日 8 时重新构建规则。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ashishpatel26/500-AI-Agents-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ashishpatel26/500-AI-Agents-Projects
Language: unknown
The 500 AI Agents Projects is a curated collection of AI agent use cases across various industries. It showcases practical applications and provides links to open-source projects for implementation, illustrating how AI agents are transforming sectors such as healthcare, finance, education, retail, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
Language: unknown
This repository contains a 90-day cybersecurity study plan, along with resources and materials for learning various cybersecurity concepts and technologies. The plan is organized into daily tasks, covering topics such as Network+, Security+, Linux, Python, Traffic Analysis, Git, ELK, AWS, Azure, and Hacking. The repository also includes a `LEARN.md

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hardikpandya/stop-slop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hardikpandya/stop-slop
Language: unknown
A skill file for removing AI tells from prose

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hyperspaceai/agi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hyperspaceai/agi
Language: unknown
The first distributed AGI system. Thousands of autonomous AI agents collaboratively train models, share experiments via P2P gossip, and push breakthroughs here. Fully peer-to-peer. Join from your browser or CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: op7418/Humanizer-zh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/op7418/Humanizer-zh
Language: unknown
Humanizer 的汉化版本，Claude Code Skills，旨在消除文本中 AI 生成的痕迹。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
Language: unknown
FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
